content:
🌟 OnlyHuman | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Filtering out AI-generated SEO spam and low-effort content from web search results and feeds.
✨ Key Features: • Blocks AI-SEO content farms • Blocks thin SEO sites • Blocks spun content and rewrites • Blocks search result spam • Integrates with uBlock Origin
📖 Summary: OnlyHuman is a filter list for uBlock Origin designed to block AI-generated SEO spam, thin content websites, and other low-effort content from search results and feeds. It aims to improve the quality of online information by removing junk content that exploits search engines.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
